title: Dashboard enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Dynamic annotation lines**: Annotation lines can now be driven by data or a calculation instead of a fixed value, letting you show running averages, variable thresholds, or anomaly markers that update with your data. See [Annotations](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations#annotations).
* **Six new preset themes**: Six new built-in color and style themes are now available for AI/BI dashboards, giving authors more ready-made options without creating a custom theme. See [Choose a preset theme](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/settings#preset).
* **Local metric view and dashboard relationship fix**: Fixed a bug where local metric views and dashboard relationships sometimes failed when referencing assets from a Hive Metastore.
* **Faceted chart fix**: Fixed an issue where faceted charts with a `DECIMAL` facet column dropped most rows in each facet.
* **Combo chart hover bug fix**: Fixed an issue where hovering over buckets with null line or area values showed an incorrect tooltip and drew a stray point at the baseline. Null values now remain null instead of displaying as 0.
